name: G-5 aggregator: --emit-load-order surfaces the ordered list of files walked so the §17 G-5 priority can be audited
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --emit-load-order 2>err.txt; grep -q '"load_order":' err.txt && echo load_order_surface 1>&2
